pkgmetadata.longdescription: Pi.. image httpstravis-ci.orgzalando-stupspiu.svgbranchmaster target httpstravis-ci.orgzalando-stupspiu alt Build Status.. image httpscoveralls.ioreposzalando-stupspiubadge.svg target httpscoveralls.iorzalando-stupspiu alt Code Coverage.. image httpsimg.shields.iopypidwstups-piu.svg target httpspypi.python.orgpypistups-piu alt PyPI Downloads.. image httpsimg.shields.iopypivstups-piu.svg target httpspypi.python.orgpypistups-piu alt Latest PyPI version.. image httpsimg.shields.iopypilstups-piu.svg target httpspypi.python.orgpypistups-piu alt LicensePi is the command line client for the even SSH access granting service.Installation.. code-block bash sudo pip3 install --upgrade stups-piuUsage.. code-block bash piu myusermyhost my-reasonSee the STUPS documentation on Pi_ for details... _STUPS documentation on Pi httpstups.readthedocs.orgenlatestcomponentspiu.htmlRunning Unit Tests.. code-block bash python3 setup.py test --cov-htmltrue
